### v2.0.0 (2026-07-06)
> [!note]- Details
> ### Platform — Features
> - Eleventy to Quartz v5 migration (#42)
> - Gate major releases via in-PR /approve-major bot
> - Add status backfill transformer for status-gated components

> - Use static grid-column spans for Safari compatibility _(scope: home)_

> - Adjust tag display, sidebar margins, and light mode colors _(scope: styles)_
> - Update internal links and improve homepage styling

> - Reordered folders in the vault
> - Stop publishing Topics.base _(scope: web)_
